title: SDK Enums
description: Enumeration types used throughout the jambonz WebRTC client SDK

ClientState.description: Possible states of a JambonzClient instance. Lifecycle: disconnected → connecting → connected → registered. On error: reconnecting or error.

CallState.description: Possible states of a JambonzCall instance. Outbound: idle → connecting → (ringing) → connected → ended. Inbound: idle → ringing → connected → ended.

CallDirection.description: Direction of a call. Inbound = received via 'incoming' event. Outbound = initiated via call() methods.
